buildCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/plutonium-smp run build; echo 'BUILD DONE'; ls artifacts/plutonium-smp/dist/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO DIST FOLDER'; node -e "const{cpSync,mkdirSync}=require('fs');mkdirSync('public',{recursive:true});cpSync('artifacts/plutonium-smp/dist/public','public',{recursive:true});" && echo 'COPY OK' || echo 'COPY FAILED'
